  • Classes in neqsim.process.controllerdevice used by neqsim.process.controllerdevice
    Class
    Description
    ControllerDeviceBaseClass
    Discrete PID controller implementation providing common features for process control in NeqSim.
    ControllerDeviceInterface
    General contract for feedback controllers operating on measurement devices in NeqSim.
    ControllerDeviceInterface.ControllerMode
    Operating modes for a feedback controller.
    ControllerDeviceInterface.StepResponseTuningMethod
    Available tuning rules for step-response based auto-tuning.
    ControllerEvent
    Event log entry capturing controller state at a particular simulation time.
    LogicBlock
    Logic operator block for control system simulation in dynamic mode.
    LogicBlock.Comparator
    Comparison operators used to convert a continuous signal to a boolean.
    LogicBlock.LogicInput
    Input definition based on a measurement device and threshold comparison.
    LogicBlock.Operator
    Logical operators supported by this block.
    ModelPredictiveController.AutoTuneConfiguration
    Configuration options for the MPC auto-tuning routine.
    ModelPredictiveController.AutoTuneConfiguration.Builder
    Builder for ModelPredictiveController.AutoTuneConfiguration objects.
    ModelPredictiveController.AutoTuneResult
    Result produced by the auto-tuning routine.
    ModelPredictiveController.MovingHorizonEstimate
    Result from the moving horizon estimation routine.
    ModelPredictiveController.QualityConstraint
    Representation of a quality constraint handled by the MPC.
    ModelPredictiveController.QualityConstraint.Builder
    Builder for ModelPredictiveController.QualityConstraint instances.
    SequentialFunctionChart.SfcStep
    A step in the Sequential Function Chart.
    SequentialFunctionChart.SfcTransition
    A transition between two steps in the SFC.
    TransferFunctionBlock.Type
    Transfer function types supported by this block.

  • Classes in neqsim.process.controllerdevice used by neqsim.process.util.scenario
    Class
    Description
    AntiSurgeController
    AntiSurgeController is a transient anti-surge regulator (P3) that reads the distance to surge from a Compressor and drives a recycle ThrottlingValve to keep the machine away from its surge line during trip, blow-down, start-up and load-rejection transients.
